title: Inserting items into workdocs
excerpt: It would be great to be able to link existing items in a workdoc.  Currently, we can create items in a doc, but not insert an existing item into a doc.

posts.author: RanieBetzina (Ranie Betzina)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to link existing items in a workdoc. Currently, we can create items in a doc, but not insert an existing item into a doc.

posts.author: greentoothbrush (ian ross)
posts.cookedHtml: And has to be the biggest use case. I have a board of items, I have a workdoc. I would like to add an item to a workdoc.
